title: It’s Good to Thank the LORD

verses.text: Your deeds, LORD, made me glad; I’ll sing of what you’ve done. How great your works, O LORD, how deep your thoughts each one. A senseless man devoid of knowledge, this truth will not understand:
All sinners grow like grass, the wicked multiply; and yet they’ll be destroyed. But, LORD, you stay on high. Your foes, LORD, fall; your foes will perish, evildoers scattered all.
You’ve poured oil on my head, like oxen I’m made strong. I’ve seen and heard the fate of those who’ve done me wrong. Like thriving palm the righteous grows, like cedars tall in Lebanon.
Those planted by the LORD will in God’s courts be seen; when old they’ll still bear fruit and flourish fresh and green, and this proclaim: how upright is the LORD, my rock, no wrong in him!
